title: Anthropic rents SpaceX?
summary: Anthropic partnered with SpaceX to access Colossus, a major GPU cluster, exposing its lack of vertical integration compared to other frontier AI labs. The analysis argues that the real AI competition is shifting from benchmarks toward control of chips, energy, and datacenter infrastructure rather than model capability alone.
